case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. GEOTECH CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER APPLICATION AND ORDER TO VACATE CLERK'S JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 1/30/03 - SIGNED BY JUDGE CONWAY.

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT GEOTECH CONSTRUCTION, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEOTECH CONSTRUCTION, INC. $7,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $823.70 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,644.00, *** PER ORDER OF 10/19/06 *** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
